headline: Why RWR’s 3.4% Yield Looks More Durable Than Most Investors Realize
summary: The SPDR Dow Jones REIT ETF (NYSEARCA:RWR) offers a 3.4% dividend yield backed by more than 100 publicly traded REITs, but the real question is whether that income holds up across rate cycles. How the Income Is Structured RWR tracks the Dow Jones U.S. Select REIT Index, owning shares in publicly traded REITs rather than ... Why RWR’s 3.4% Yield Looks More Durable Than Most Investors Realize
